parsed_output.justification: The discussion shows that Justin claims to have become a werewolf via copycat, yet he also repeatedly deflects blame onto Tyler and claims Tyler’s card was a werewolf. Multiple players (Paul, Mitchell) express uncertainty but lean toward Tyler being the threat, especially after Tyler admits his card was a werewolf. With no clear evidence of a second werewolf and Tyler’s admission, voting Tyler maximizes the chance of eliminating a werewolf.
